topic: Ben Duckett Scores Century in England's Series Win Over India
headline: BEN DUCKETT SMASHES RECORD-BREAKING 149 TO LEAD ENGLAND TO THRILLING 1-0 SERIES LEAD OVER INDIA
summary: Ben Duckett scored a record-breaking 149 to lead England to a five-wicket win over India in the first Test at Headingley, helping his team chase down a target of 371. This victory gives England a 1-0 lead in the five-match series. Duckett's innings is considered one of the finest by an England batter. England won the match despite India's strong performances, including centuries from several of their players.
